reachability_artifacts: built sworn maintainability review run from cmd/sworn/maintainability_scope_test.go:TestMaintainabilityScopeBinaryReachability constructs C-04 and then fails closed at the next unavailable gate

effort_complexity.rationale: Canonical committed semantic identity and normalized diff over complex Git provenance.

release_benefit: Gives every maintainability and integration decision one reproducible semantic identity.

design_decisions.choice: Make C-04 the sole semantic-scope authority reached through the serial maintainability command after C-07 synchronization validation.
options: one C-04 authority on the public command path
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified under Brad's 2026-07-16 Coach instruction to follow the orchestrator recommendation: use one C-04 authority on the public command path.
design_decisions.rationale: The command cannot dispatch or reuse a report until exact committed scope and synchronization provenance agree.

design_decisions.choice: Recognize only the exact digest-pinned sealed pre-C12 historical reconciliation entries inside their declared consumer slice, immutable start, exact review head, first-parent interval, and purpose while protocol authority is planning.
options: grant a generic manual merge waiver
recognize exact interval-bound historical evidence only
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified under Brad's standing instruction to follow the orchestrator recommendation: preserve immutable S01/S02 evidence through exact interval-bound sealed historical recognition only.
design_decisions.rationale: The exact authorization envelope preserves already-consumed evidence without authorizing another slice, endpoint, purpose, or custom merge and without weakening ordinary section-6 provenance on the same merge.

positive_scenarios: The same committed semantic inputs always produce the same C-04 output.
An exact interval-bound S01/S02 sealed bootstrap entry is recognized only while planning authority and every ordinary section-6 check on the same merge succeeds.
negative_scenarios: Stale, ambiguous, custom, dirty, or malformed provenance never produces a reusable identity.
A consumer slice, start, exact review head, interval endpoint, purpose, digest, OID, path-set, tuple, authority, or unlisted/future exception mismatch blocks before scope or dispatch.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: Canonical scope eliminates adapter-local diffs and makes safe evidence reuse mechanically decidable.
